announcement: Welcome to the Crestwood Track Boosters store! Every tee, hoodie, water bottle, and bottle of our booster BBQ sauce funds meet entry fees, uniforms, and travel for the Crestwood High School track and field team in Birmingham, AL. Run by volunteer coach Shannon Perry. Pick up at home meets or have it shipped. Go Knights!
digital_sale_message: Thanks for supporting Crestwood Track! Your meet program PDF and order details are attached. See you at the next invitational.
policy_payment: Payment via Etsy Payments including credit, debit, and Etsy gift cards. All proceeds go directly to the Crestwood High School track and field program. Bulk team orders can be arranged by message.
policy_refunds: 30-day return on unworn, unwashed items with tags. Personalized athlete-name items are final sale unless they arrive flawed. Food items such as BBQ sauce are non-returnable.
policy_shipping: Shipped from Birmingham, AL within 1-3 business days via USPS. Local meet-day pickup is available at Crestwood High School, just leave a note at checkout.
policy_welcome: Welcome to Crestwood Track Boosters, and thanks for supporting our student-athletes!
sale_message: Thank you for supporting Crestwood Track and Field! Your order helps cover meet fees and gear for our athletes. Reach out anytime with sizing questions. Go Knights!
title: Crestwood Track Boosters - Team Tees, Hoodies and Fundraiser BBQ - Birmingham, AL
vacation_message: We are between seasons! Orders placed now ship the first week of the next meet schedule. Thanks for your patience and your support of Crestwood Track.
